offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes compliance issues. We automate sales tax report generation instead of manual tracking.
problem: Difficulty in generating accurate sales tax reports for multiple jurisdictions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
